'''Bavris''' was a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Bavris won praise from his men and Republic politicians for posting a bounty on the location and capture of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] equipment, a bounty that led directly to the apprehension of the [[crawl-carrier]] development facility on [[Dagro]].

{{Char-stub}}
